creator: krichy@tvnetwork.hu
text:
Dear Guido,

It is ok for me, let it go.

Regards,


Kojedzinszky Richard
Euronet Magyarorszag Informatikai Zrt.

On Thu, 11 Apr 2013, Guido Falsi wrote:

> Date: Thu, 11 Apr 2013 23:29:29 +0200
> From: Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, krichy@pi.nmdps.net, krichy@tvnetwork.hu
> Subject: Re: ports/177560: [maintainer-update]: devel/libjson++: update to
>     0.4.0
> 
> Hi,
>
> Thank you for you submission.
>
> I also trimmed the Makefile header on this port. To make it standard I 
> expanded your nick to your full name and email address in the Created by: 
> name.
>
> The rest of the patch is the same as yours.
>
> Are you ok with the expanded name in Created by? The other option is to do 
> without any Created by line and have just the $FreeBSD$ line.
>
> Thanks again.
>
> -- 
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
>
